metadata.title: About Xpandia | Spanish and English Expertise, Language Assurance & Cultural Intelligence
metadata.description: Meet Xpandia, a boutique Spanish and English expertise firm helping AI, SaaS, EdTech, Product, Localization, CX, and Marketing teams validate, improve, and culturally adapt Spanish and English experiences for real users.
metadata.ogTitle: About Xpandia | Spanish and English Expertise, Language Assurance & Cultural Intelligence
metadata.ogDescription: Meet Xpandia, a boutique Spanish and English expertise firm helping AI, SaaS, EdTech, Product, Localization, CX, and Marketing teams validate, improve, and culturally adapt Spanish and English experiences for real users.

hero.sub: Xpandia helps AI, SaaS, EdTech, Product, Localization, CX, and Marketing teams validate, improve, and culturally adapt digital experiences for English and Spanish-speaking audiences.
hero.body: We combine senior Spanish/English language expertise, localization judgment, applied cultural intelligence, and product-aware QA to help teams build digital experiences users can understand, trust, and act on.

positioning.headline: A language firm specialized in Spanish/English quality, adaptation, and cultural intelligence.
positioning.body1: Xpandia was created for companies that need more than translation. We support teams building products, content, AI experiences, support journeys, campaigns, and market strategies for Spanish-speaking users.
positioning.body2: Our work sits at the intersection of language, culture, product, and business judgment. We help teams understand what works in Spanish and English, what creates friction, what needs adaptation, and what is ready for real users.
positioning.callout: Xpandia gives teams the expert judgment and structured guidance they need to move from assumptions to confident, informed decisions.

differentiators.headline: Spanish quality shapes trust, adoption, and growth.
differentiators.intro: Companies can generate, translate, or review Spanish/English in many ways. But when language affects product experience, customer trust, conversion, support, or market readiness, teams need more than language fluency or a quick review. Xpandia brings the structure, cultural context, product awareness, and senior judgment needed to understand what is working, what creates friction, and what needs to improve before a Spanish/English product reaches real users.

cards.title: Senior language judgment
cards.body: Expert review focused on linguistic quality, semantic accuracy, clarity, tone, terminology, fluency, and target audience alignment.

cards.title: Localization and product context
cards.body: Content evaluated or adapted directly within real-world software environments, UX flows, support channels, marketing assets, and EdTech platforms.

cards.title: Applied Cultural Intelligence
cards.body: Strategic cultural insights to decode trust signals, audience expectations, communication styles, and market fit.

cards.title: AI and output evaluation
cards.body: Structured audit of AI-generated outputs, chatbot interactions, virtual tutors, copilots, autonomous agents, and automated support flows.

cards.title: Decision-ready evidence
cards.body: Seamless delivery of scorecards, error taxonomies, severity ratings, annotated examples, and actionable executive readouts.

cards.title: Practical business focus
cards.body: Actionable recommendations tailored to streamline the workflows of Product, AI, Localization, CX, Support, Marketing, EdTech, and leadership teams.

founder.headline: Senior expertise in language, localization, quality assurance, and cultural intelligence.
founder.body1: Xpandia was built on a practical belief: language quality is a business issue. It shapes product experience, trust, customer understanding, market readiness, and growth.
founder.body2: Founder-led and supported by a network of senior experts, Xpandia helps global teams turn language, localization, and cultural quality questions into clear business decisions. We combine linguistic precision, localization experience, cultural insight, multilingual business communication, QA thinking, and product-aware judgment to help teams turn complex language and cultural challenges into digital experiences that feel clear, trusted, and ready to scale.
founder.name: Nestor Solano
founder.title: FOUNDER, XPANDIA APPLIED CULTURAL INTELLIGENCE SAS
founder.bio1: Nestor leads Xpandia's work at the intersection of language quality, localization, and Applied Cultural Intelligence. For more than 20 years, he has supported global teams, including work with Fortune 500 companies, across English-Spanish-Portuguese translation, language QA, localization management, Go-To-Market strategy, and cross-cultural communication in multilingual business contexts.
founder.bio2: Through Xpandia and its network of senior experts, Nestor brings the linguistic, cultural, and business judgment that teams need to evaluate, improve, and deliver digital experiences that are clear, trusted, culturally aligned, and ready for the English and Spanish-speaking audiences they serve.

howWeWork.headline: Focused, practical, and structured processes for product teams that need to make data-driven decisions.

steps.title: Context analysis and alignment
steps.body: We align on your product architecture, target audience, language variants, business goals, timelines, content types, and current engineering challenges.

steps.title: Tailored audit and adaptation
steps.body: We apply the exact mix of expert language judgment, advanced localization, cultural intelligence, specialized QA criteria, and deep product awareness.

steps.title: Decision-ready evidence delivery
steps.body: You receive structured findings, prioritized fixes, fully adapted assets, scorecards, technical issue logs, and frameworks ready for your development team to deploy.

steps.title: Deployment strategy and next steps
steps.body: We empower your team to confidently execute the optimal next move: ship to production, fix, retest, adapt, train, govern, or scale.

startingPoints.headline: Start with the engagement your team needs now.

cards.title: QA Diagnostics
cards.body: For teams that need a fast expert read before choosing the right engagement.

cards.title: AI Quality Audit Sprint
cards.body: For teams who want to validate AI-generated Spanish or English outputs before users rely on them.

cards.title: Launch Readiness Audit
cards.body: For teams that need structured findings, severity ratings, and readiness recommendations before launch or relaunch.

cards.title: Language Experience Repair
cards.body: For teams that need to improve Spanish or English content, product copy, help content, messaging, or customer-facing experiences.

cards.title: ACI Talk / Executive Briefing
cards.body: For global teams that need practical Cultural Intelligence, cross-cultural communication, and audience-readiness guidance.

cards.title: Language Quality Advisory
cards.body: For teams that need ongoing senior Spanish/English quality leadership, standards, workflows, and decision support.

items.label: 20+ years
items.text: Global localization and language quality experience.

items.label: Bilingual Spanish-English focus
items.text: LatAm, US Hispanic, Spain, and regional variants.

items.label: Built for teams
items.text: AI, Product, SaaS, EdTech, Localization, CX, and Marketing teams.

items.label: Expertise
items.text: Across language assurance, localization, QA, cultural intelligence, and business communication.

finalCta.headline: Let's find the right Language quality path for your team.
finalCta.body: Whether you need to validate AI outputs, improve your Spanish/English content, train a global team, or understand an English or Spanish-speaking audience, Xpandia can help you choose the right next step.
